nodes.label: NOAA / NASA reanalysis regional temperature & precipitation anomalies
NOAA Global Monitoring Laboratory (atmospheric CO2 record)
NSIDC / NOAA@NSIDC Sea Ice Index (satellite-passive-microwave sea-ice extent)
NASA FIRMS (VIIRS thermal anomalies, clustered into escalation signals)
US EPA RadNet + Safecast (ambient radiation measurements)
UCDP (Uppsala Conflict Data Program — Georeferenced Event Dataset)
abuse.ch (URLhaus malware URLs + Feodo Tracker C2 indicators)
WHO Disease Outbreak News + US CDC Health Alert Network
CelesTrak TLE element sets (derived from US Space Command public catalog)
UNHCR Refugee Data + UN OCHA HAPI (refugee / asylum / IDP counts)
